who: insurance claims supervisors at small insurance firms processing 5–15 claims/month
offer: For insurance claims supervisors at small insurance firms processing 5–15 claims/month, lack of compliance summaries causes regulatory penalties. We provide monthly compliance summaries instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem: Difficulty in maintaining compliance with insurance regulations due to lack of timely summaries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims supervisors
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tracking
DM outreach to insurance claims supervisors with demo video
Community forums for sharing compliance tools
try_it: Let users try monthly compliance summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
